combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
Bar ANA | Dessert and cocktail bar in Atlanta
0
Book your Bar ANA reservation on Resy
Led by James Beard-nominated Executive Pastry Chef Claudia Martínez, Bar ANA is Atlanta's premiere, late-night 21+ dessert and cocktail bar.
We provide artfully-plated desserts, curated cocktails and a refined yet vibrant atmosphere in the Poncey-Highland neighborhood of Atlanta.
About Bar ANA
2026 James Beard Award Nomination
Our Executive Pastry Chef Claudia Martínez has been nominated by the James Beard Foundation as semifinalist for
Outstanding Pastry Chef or Baker
The 2026 James Beard Award Semifinalists
Menus
At Bar ANA, each visit is a little different, so you can always expect something unique, delicious and crafted with care.

Menus
At Bar ANA, our menus are meant to inspire. What you see online reflects examples of what we love to serve, though selections may shift with the seasons and the creativity of our team.
Each visit is a little different, so you can always expect something unique, delicious and crafted with care.

Each visit is a little different, so you can always expect something unique, delicious and crafted with care.

meta.meta_description:
Led by James Beard-nominated Executive Pastry Chef Claudia Martínez, Bar 
ANA is Atlanta's premiere, late-night 21+ dessert and cocktail bar. We 
provide artfully-plated desserts, curated cocktails and a refined yet 
vibrant atmosphere in the Poncey-Highland neighborhood of Atlanta.
